domain.name: knowledge_assistant
domain.description: Internal knowledge assistant (use case #4). A KnowledgeAssistAgent answers HR/IT/policy questions grounded on an internal corpus — it retrieves the governing documents (native retrieval tool, optionally fed by an EXTERNAL SharePoint/Confluence corpus via a Consumed REST API, exactly like the live KnowledgeAgent example), composes an Answer, and writes the supporting Citations. This is primarily a READ/retrieve agent: the bounded action space is answer-with-citation | escalate-to-human, and escalate is the only real write. When the corpus does not ground a confident answer, the agent PROPOSES an Escalation and a HITL routing workflow hands the question to a subject_expert queue. Every question, answer, citation, and escalation is audited. The grounded-citation contract + the human-at-the-escalation-step is what makes it trustworthy, not just fluent.

capabilities.name: AskQuestion
capabilities.note: Employee intake — records the Question and kicks off the answer workflow.

capabilities.name: AnswerQuestion
capabilities.note: THE AGENT. Grounds on KnowledgeDoc via a native retrieval tool (optionally backed by an EXTERNAL SharePoint/Confluence corpus through a Consumed REST API, like the live KnowledgeAgent example), composes an Answer and writes its supporting Citations. When the corpus does not yield a confident, grounded answer it sets Grounded=false and PROPOSES an Escalation — it never answers ungrounded.

capabilities.name: RecordAnswer
capabilities.note: The bounded WRITE to the system of record for a grounded answer: mark the Answer published + the Question answered with its Citations, audited. Called by the workflow when the agent returns a grounded answer.

capabilities.name: RaiseEscalation
capabilities.note: The other bounded write: route an unanswerable/low-confidence Question to the subject_expert queue, audited. Called by the workflow when the agent could not ground an answer.

capabilities.name: AnswerWorkflow
capabilities.note: HITL via OutSystems BPT: on QuestionAsked the workflow runs the KnowledgeAssistAgent to produce a grounded Answer + Citations; a grounded, high-confidence result auto-calls RecordAnswer, while a low-confidence/ungrounded result holds at a Human activity and calls RaiseEscalation to route the Question to a subject_expert. The routing + audit is native workflow, not custom code.

capabilities.name: ExpertInbox
capabilities.note: Where a subject_expert resolves an escalated Question — writes the expert Answer, closes the Escalation, audited. The human-in-the-loop resolution step.

capabilities.name: ManageCorpus
capabilities.note: Admin maintains the KnowledgeDoc corpus the agent grounds on (and configures the external corpus sync).

integrations.name: CorpusSource
integrations.purpose: external internal-knowledge corpus (SharePoint/Confluence-style REST) the KnowledgeAssistAgent retrieves from as a tool — mirrors the live KnowledgeAgent SharePointKB.SearchText consume

integrations.name: IdentityProvider
integrations.purpose: corporate IdP for employee/expert identity and directory lookup on escalation routing
